entry.title: New: Bill 117, CD1 (2022) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AUTHORIZING THE MAYOR OF THE COUNTY OF MAUI TO ENTER INTO AN INTERGOVERNMENTAL AGREEMENT WITH THE UNIVERSITY OF HAWAII FOR THE PROVISION OF HAWAIIAN LANGUAGE AND HAWAIIAN STUDIES WORKSHOPS FOR EMPLOYEES OF THE COUNTY OF MAUI"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
